calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Apr-04-2024 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Cory Robert Lunn Plaintiff/Respondent in Pro Per
Taghi Astanee, Esq. appears representing Defendant/Appellant Ching-Chi Chang

All parties are sworn.

Mr. Astanee makes arguments on behalf of Defendant/Appellant Ching-Chi Chang.
The Court asks clarifying questions.

Plaintiff/Respondent Cory Robert Lunn testifies on his own behalf.
The Court asks clarifying questions.

The Court takes a brief recess to allow parties to sort costs.

Court reconvenes.

The Court takes a brief recess to allow parties to continue sorting costs.

At the close of the hearing, the Court rules as follows:

The Court affirms the judgment with a modified amount. The Court awards $1897.07 with costs of $75 to Plaintiff/Respondent.

Judge: Garrett L. Wong, Clerk: K. Septien, Not reported, (504).
